---
title: "Slide"
format: html
---

# Acknowledgements

- I want to acknowledge the UMGCCC FCSR, Dr. Xiaoxuan Fan, Natarajan Ayithan, Mikalya Trainor. 

- Similarly acknowlegde my thesis mentors Drs. Cristiana Cairo and Kirsten Lyke. 

- Flow Cytometry Reddit, Cytometry Discord, and Bioconductor Zulip communities for inspiring the investigation of many of these rabbit holes
